text:
狭いとこが苦手って人は
意外と多いんだよねー。

閉所恐怖症とまでは言わないけど
狭いと落ち着かなくて
思いどおりに動けないんだとか。

そういう人にこそブレイバーとか
言えるといいなー、って思ってさ。
実験実験、お試し挑戦だよ。

もちろんあなたは大丈夫だと思うけど。
いつもどおり先導よろしく

You ever notice how many people seem put
off by tight spaces?

And I'm not even talking claustrophobic people
here, just the sorts that sort of lose their
cool when the walls draw close.

Well, I'm hoping even people like that might
strive to be Bravers. That's what our next
little mission here is all about.

Now I know you're probably fine and all,
so just go about this and take the lead
like you always do.
